name: Chunky Chicken Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Chicken breast meat, cut into bite-sized pieces
2 cups Fresh tomato salsa (see following recipe)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the chicken, onions, and garlic in a large pot.
2. Add all tomatoes, water, and beans to the pot. Simmer for 30 minutes.
3. Add all other ingredients and simmer until beans and vegetables are tender.
